name: Decatur Postal
description_short: City of Decatur, Georgia's official municipal website providing government services, public information, and community resources to residents and visitors.
description_long: Decatur Postal is not a consumer finance company. The website decaturga.com is the official municipal website for the City of Decatur, Georgia, a local government entity. The domain serves as the primary digital hub for city services, public records, community information, and municipal government operations. Upon investigation, the website is protected by Cloudflare security services and displays a standard security verification page, preventing access to actual site content. The website architecture and URL structure indicate this is a standard city government portal rather than any financial services provider. No evidence exists on the accessible portions of this website that Decatur Postal operates as a payday-alternative lender, credit union, CDFI, or any other consumer finance service. The current categorization as 'payday-alternatives' appears to be based on a name confusion or data entry error, as the company name does not match any known financial services entity. Without access to substantive website content due to security verification barriers, no specific financial products, terms, or services can be verified. The profile record requires immediate correction to reflect the actual nature and purpose of this entity.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks
NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000
cons: Website is not accessible due to Cloudflare security verification blocking content review
